subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. May 1912 in New York
subcodes.first_line: Tell Juliet that she teaches well. I have met many people who have been affected by you, Juliet. You are not eloquent, you are not fluent, but your heart teaches.
subcodes.subjects: @confirmations and rewards in teaching the Cause, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power; influence of a single soul in teaching the Cause
